 From the Library of Congress.
Today we are visiting with Aaron Dixon. The Southern Oil History Program at UNC Chapel Hill is recording.
We talked about Stokeley Carmichael earlier in the interview.
And then there is the H. Rat Brown story.
He met Walter Concrite when Margaret the King was assassinated.
Several years later Aaron worked with James Foreman in Atlanta.
Bobby Seale and Huey Newton founded the party.
She was scared that Foreman might be there.
The end.
